generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on the motor for measuring motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox for measuring gearwheel position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel position data from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
]

instance MeasuredMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor velocity data derived from motor position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityData
]

instance MeasuredGearboxVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gearwheel velocity data derived from gearbox position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxVelocityData
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data derived from motor velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationData
]

instance MotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor torque output data derived from current sensor measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentData
]

instance GearwheelTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearwheel torque output data derived from gearbox position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque output from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityData
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorVelocityData
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModeling
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Coulomb-Viscous friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Stribeck friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for Dahl friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for LuGre friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulation
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital representation of robot components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance SysMLModeling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling for structural analysis of the robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for dynamic simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelExchangeService
]

instance MQTTStreaming : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for monitoring robot performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance FrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models based on operational conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateAction
]

instance DataTraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Full traceability of data origin and computation processes"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot motion and friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into friction parameters for improving motion accuracy"
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters based on friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Traceability of data lineage and computational steps"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system performance metrics"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for position, speed, or acceleration inputs"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output"
]

instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains Motor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIKController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual, as per reference model [32]."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of Purpose (FrictionDerivation singleton), Asset (Mabi described by SysML SystemModel), DataTraces (measured/simulated data for current, torque, angular velocity), Sources (sensors and simulation components), Processing components (Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB), and Models (engineering, simulation, data calculation)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; digital shadow integrates operational data and live measurements during robot operation for continuous improvement due to wear, different tools, or applications."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor time series from physical to virtual."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Implementation of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) standard and SysML standard for systems modeling."
]
